explanation: The response correctly identifies the memory-bound bottleneck with HIGH confidence, cites specific metric values (0.03 FLOP/byte arithmetic intensity, 274.8% DRAM BW utilization, 34.7% long scoreboard stalls) and a concrete code pattern (one thread per row streaming 1024 floats), and correctly treats the long scoreboard stalls as a secondary symptom of memory-boundedness rather than the primary cause.
